Can only be called by the current owner."}},"title":"LockVault","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"addToken(address,address)":{"notice":"Add a token to the whitelist with an associated Chainlink-compatible price feed."},"baseRewardRate()":{"notice":"Reward tokens emitted per staked token per second, scaled by RATE_PRECISION.         Example: 1e9 means 1e9/1e18 = 1e-9 reward tokens per staked token per second."},"emergencyWithdraw(uint256)":{"notice":"Withdraw before lock expires. Forfeits 50% of accrued rewards to treasury."},"getPendingRewards(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Returns pending rewards (in VaultToken wei) for a specific stake.         Returns 0 for already-claimed stakes."},"getTotalValueLocked()":{"notice":"Returns total USD value of all staked tokens, using on-chain price feeds.         Price feeds return values with 8 decimals (Chainlink standard).         Token decimals are read via IERC20Metadata so any ERC-20 is handled correctly.         Result is expressed in USD with 8 decimal places."},"getUserStakes(address)":{"notice":"Returns all stake structs for `user`."},"removeToken(address)":{"notice":"Remove a token from the whitelist. Existing stakes are unaffected and         remain withdrawable \u2014 only new deposits are blocked."},"setBaseRewardRate(uint256)":{"notice":"Update the base reward rate (scaled by RATE_PRECISION)."},"setTreasury(address)":{"notice":"Update the treasury address for penalty fees."},"stake(address,uint256,uint8)":{"notice":"Deposit `amount` of `token` for the given lock tier."},"withdraw(uint256)":{"notice":"Withdraw stake after lock period expires, collecting all accrued rewards."}},"notice":"Time-locked staking protocol. Users deposit whitelisted ERC-20 tokens for fixed         durations and receive VaultToken rewards. MembershipNFT holders earn bonus rewards. Access Control:   Uses OpenZeppelin Ownable (single-admin pattern). Rationale: the protocol has a small,   well-defined set of privileged operations (whitelist, rate, treasury). A single owner   key (or multisig behind it) is simpler to reason about and audit than role-based access   control, which would add surface area without meaningful benefit at this stage.   Trade-off: a compromised owner can delist tokens or change the reward rate, but cannot   steal user principal (which is always withdrawable). AccessControl would be preferable   if different operators need to manage subsets of admin functions. Reward Calculation:   rewards = amount * baseRate * elapsed * lockMultiplier / 1e18   baseRate is expressed as reward tokens per staked token per second, scaled by 1e18   to preserve precision in integer arithmetic. Lock multipliers are stored as numerator/   denominator pairs (e.g., 2.5x \u2192 25/10) to avoid floating point. Reentrancy:   All state mutations (marking stakes as claimed, zeroing amounts) happen BEFORE external   calls (token transfers, VaultToken.mint). This checks-effects-interactions pattern is   sufficient \u2014 ReentrancyGuard would be redundant and adds ~2,300 gas per guarded owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.amount: Amount to deposit (in token's native decimals)

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

addToken(address,address).notice: Add a token to the whitelist with an associated Chainlink-compatible price feed.

baseRewardRate().notice: Reward tokens emitted per staked token per second, scaled by RATE_PRECISION.         Example: 1e9 means 1e9/1e18 = 1e-9 reward tokens per staked token per second.

emergencyWithdraw(uint256).notice: Withdraw before lock expires. Forfeits 50% of accrued rewards to treasury.

getPendingRewards(address,uint256).notice: Returns pending rewards (in VaultToken wei) for a specific stake.         Returns 0 for already-claimed stakes.

getTotalValueLocked().notice: Returns total USD value of all staked tokens, using on-chain price feeds.         Price feeds return values with 8 decimals (Chainlink standard).         Token decimals are read via IERC20Metadata so any ERC-20 is handled correctly.         Result is expressed in USD with 8 decimal places.

removeToken(address).notice: Remove a token from the whitelist. Existing stakes are unaffected and         remain withdrawable — only new deposits are blocked.

setBaseRewardRate(uint256).notice: Update the base reward rate (scaled by RATE_PRECISION).

setTreasury(address).notice: Update the treasury address for penalty fees.

stake(address,uint256,uint8).notice: Deposit `amount` of `token` for the given lock tier.

withdraw(uint256).notice: Withdraw stake after lock period expires, collecting all accrued rewards.
